header.name: Marcos Aurelio
header.headline: Senior Backend Engineer - Product Engineering, APIs & Software Architecture - PHP, Go, AWS, Kubernetes - CI/CD, Observability & Distributed Systems

professional_summary.paragraph1: Senior Backend Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and delivering PHP, Go, and cloud-native platforms at scale. Expert in software architecture, distributed systems, microservices, AWS infrastructure, Kubernetes orchestration, and end-to-end platform ownership. Proven track record: 90%+ reduction in critical incidents, 99.9% availability sustained, deployment time reduced from 40 to 12 minutes, MTTR reduced from 2 hours to under 6 minutes.
professional_summary.paragraph2: Specialized in backend API design, system architecture, observability (Grafana, Prometheus, Loki), CI/CD automation (GitHub Actions, Argo CD), database optimization (MySQL, PostgreSQL), and legacy modernization. Led technical initiatives across SaaS, e-commerce, ERP integrations, and mission-critical transactional systems. Managed 1,500+ projects and 3,200+ technical tickets while maintaining production reliability and operational excellence.

skills_details.backend: Languages: PHP, Go, JavaScript, SQL. Frameworks & Patterns: Laravel, Symfony, Zend Framework, Ruby on Rails, Node.js, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Microservices, Backend Services. Commerce: Magento 1, Magento 2, Adobe Commerce, Headless Commerce, Marketplace Integrations.
skills_details.architecture: Architecture & Engineering: System Design, Distributed Systems, Microservices Architecture, API Design, Clean Code, SOLID Principles, Design Patterns, Refactoring, Legacy Modernization, Trade-off Analysis, Evolution Strategy, Resilience & Scalability.
skills_details.data: Data & Performance: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, SQL Optimization, Query Tuning, Data Modeling, Caching Strategies, Master-Slave Replication, Performance Analysis, High-Volume System Optimization.
skills_details.integration: Integrations & Critical Systems: ERP Integrations, Banking APIs, Payment Gateways, Marketplace Integrations, Logistics, Transactional Workflows, Operational Automation, Business Process Integration, Incident Response.
skills_details.cloud: Cloud & DevOps: AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, S3), Kubernetes, Docker, Docker Compose, GitOps, Argo CD, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI/CD, Infrastructure as Code, Deployment Automation, Environment Management, Cost Optimization.
skills_details.observability: Observability & Reliability: Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, Promtail, Alertmanager, ELK Stack, Metrics & Monitoring, Alerting, Incident Analysis, MTTR Reduction, Availability Engineering, SLOs, Testing (TDD, Unit Testing, Integration Testing).
skills_details.leadership: Leadership & Collaboration: Code Review, Technical Mentoring, Pair Programming, Documentation, Technical Decision-Making, Team Onboarding, Product Communication, Engineering Standards, Continuous Improvement, Knowledge Transfer.

experience.position: Software Engineer III / Senior Product Engineer, Backend & Platform (Full-time)
experience.description: • Architect and deliver backend services for mission-critical product initiatives with focus on API design, system design, observability and production reliability. • Transform product requirements into RESTful API contracts, data models, implementation plans and production-ready services. • Build resilient, scalable services leveraging MySQL, PostgreSQL, caching, CI/CD automation, testing and observability. • Support technical decision-making connecting business impact, operational risk, delivery velocity and architectural sustainability. • Drive end-to-end ownership from design through monitoring and incident response.

I contribute intermittently to PHP core and php-web through improvements, bug fixes and technical discussions. This participation strengthened my foundation in backend engineering, code quality, PHP ecosystem workings and fundamentals of technologies widely used in web products.

• Taught software development curriculum bridging academic theory with industry backend engineering, APIs, architecture and system design. • Covered object-oriented programming, MVC patterns, software quality, continuous delivery and distributed systems applied to real-world products. • Mentored students in engineering practices, code organization, web development and incremental delivery methodology. • Developed technical communication and people training capabilities through direct mentoring and collaboration.

experience.position: Product Engineering Consultant / Backend & Platform (Consulting Engagement)
experience.description: • Delivered backend architecture and platform engineering solutions for digital transformation, infrastructure modernization and integration projects. • Designed and implemented scalable systems with focus on performance, API quality, resilience, CI/CD automation and observability. • Supported technical teams in GitOps practices, microservices architecture, testing strategies and delivery process optimization. • Established engineering standards and best practices for sustainable, maintainable platforms.

Reduced critical incidents by 90%+ | Sustained 99.9% platform availability | Reduced deployment time from 40 to 12 minutes | Reduced MTTR from 2 hours to under 6 minutes | Reduced support response time by 35%. 
• Owned end-to-end technical cycle for product initiatives: architecture design, backend implementation, CI/CD automation, observability and production reliability. • Redesigned cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes) for resilience and operational excellence. • Built CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Argo CD) eliminating manual failure points. • Implemented observability platform (Grafana, Loki, Promtail, Prometheus, Alertmanager) for rapid incident response. • Maintained critical backend services, integrations and business workflows with focus on reliability and performance. • Delivered ERP and banking integrations without disruption to critical flows. • Created internal automation tools and diagnostics improving platform stability and support efficiency. • Executed 70+ sprints aligning deliveries with product KPIs, operational constraints and reliability goals.

experience.position: Software Architect / Engineering Manager / Senior Backend Engineer (Sept 2018 - April 2024)
experience.description: Managed 1,500+ projects in production | Resolved 3,200+ support and integration tickets | Delivered 500+ complex integrations | Reduced backlog from 900 to 300 tickets | Consolidated 40+ developers. • Led architectural decisions and modernization across commerce platform, infrastructure, integrations and engineering systems. • Conducted technology evaluation and selection (Go, Ruby on Rails, Symfony, Laravel, Node.js) aligned with business objectives. • Led infrastructure migration from AWS to Huawei Cloud using GitOps, serverless patterns and Argo CD. • Structured CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI, Dokku, Buildpacks) improving delivery consistency across teams. • Delivered scalable e-commerce solutions (Magento 2, Adobe Commerce) while maintaining legacy systems (Magento 1, Zend Framework, WordPress). • Built product and platform initiatives: SaaS proof of concept, automated store builder, unified reporting, internal tooling and developer support platform. • Managed engineering delivery across support, deployment, integrations and maintenance for 40+ developers. • Implemented Jira Software and Service Management for project tracking, demand flow and operational visibility. • Built Laravel microservices for marketplace scenarios and Zend Framework integrations for ERP contexts. • Led backend development for 500+ projects: ERPs, payment gateways, marketplaces, logistics. • Introduced Redis caching, MySQL master-slave architecture, ELK-based diagnostics and database performance optimization. • Created Corsair, company's first Docker-based development environment tool, standardizing setup and accelerating onboarding.

education.title: UEL - State University of Londrina
education.description:
I conduct applied research in the areas of software engineering, distributed architecture, network security and process automation, focusing on real problems and implementable solutions. 
I develop my dissertation with the theme “Right to be Forgotten in Blockchain”, critically addressing the legal and computational challenges arising from the immutability of data in distributed systems. 
I apply technologies such as Hyperledger, Solidity and public and permissioned blockchains, with an emphasis on cryptography, smart contracts, consensus mechanisms and privacy preservation. 
I use Python for data analysis, developing solutions aimed at mining, visualization, statistical modeling and process automation.

education.title: UEL - State University of Londrina
education.organization: Specialization in Software Engineering, Software Engineering
education.description:
Activities and groups: Software Engineering, Systems Architecture, Agile Methodologies, Scrum, DevOps, CI/CD, Automated Testing, Software Quality, Software Design, Project Patterns, Project Management, Requirements Analysis, Continuous Integration, Deployment, Agile Development, Technical Documentation, Refactoring, Maintainability, Scalability, Software Lifecycle, Requirements Engineering, Specialization, UEL, Engineering Systems.…see more 
I have training focused on modern software engineering, with an emphasis on the development of complex and scalable projects. 
I developed skills in distributed systems, component modeling and application of design patterns, aiming for architectural organization and reuse. 
I applied agile methodologies such as Scrum and Kanban, in addition to CI/CD and DevOps practices, incorporating test automation into the development flow. 
I worked with requirements gathering, refactoring, technical documentation and software life cycle management (SDLC), ensuring continuous evolution of solutions. 
Directed efforts towards software quality (QA), using different testing strategies and quality metrics to ensure reliability and performance. 
I deepened my training in project management and technical leadership, consolidating my ability to lead teams and strategic decisions.

education.title: SENAI, London
education.description:
Activities and groups: Programming, Web Development, Java, PHP, MySQL, IoT, Arduino, Automation, Database, Embedded Systems, Internet of Things, Software Development, Integrative Projects, Emerging Technologies, Software Engineering, Applied Biotechnology, Data Analysis, Water Quality, APIs, Fullstack, Systems Integration, Backend, Frontend, Arduino Workshop, SENAI, Technician in IT.…see more 
I have technical training in fullstack development, web applications, automation and embedded systems. 
I developed IoT solutions using Arduino, including water quality monitoring projects with sensor integration. 
I implemented applications using Java, PHP and MySQL, with responsive interfaces and a focus on usability. 
I gained experience in process automation and electronic prototyping, connecting software and hardware into practical solutions. 
I participated in software engineering projects applying agile methodologies, contributing to iterative and organized deliveries. 
I consolidated knowledge in modern web architectures and the main technologies used in contemporary development.

I work with strategic communication, digital marketing and user experience (UX), consistently connecting technical and business domains. 
I developed skills in campaign planning, branding, market research, multimedia production and graphic design, structuring result-oriented initiatives. 
I deepened my knowledge in consumer behavior, KPI analysis, commercial strategy and construction of conversion-oriented narratives.

I maintain effective communication with stakeholders, translating technical processes into business value and ensuring alignment between strategy, execution and organizational objectives.

projects.title: Proof of erasure
projects.organization: Associate(s) with UEL - State University of Londrina
projects.description:
UEL - Blockchain, privacy, cryptography, distributed architecture 
Research and prototype on the conflict between blockchain immutability and GDPR/LGPD erasure requirements. The architecture uses encrypted data, versioned updates, and forensic fingerprinting to support a three-tier proof model for verifiable cryptographic inaccessibility.

projects.title: DID Behavior Analyzer
projects.organization: Associate(s) with UEL - State University of Londrina
projects.description:
UEL - Python, Vue.js, decentralized identity, anomaly analysis 
Decentralized identity credentials simulation and behavior analysis tool. Generated more than 2 million synthetic records to validate anomaly detection logic while maintaining reproducible and auditable research datasets.

projects.title: Veritas
projects.organization: Associate(s) with UEL - State University of Londrina
projects.description:
Experimental platform for collaborative execution of zero-knowledge proofs over a P2P network, using parallel competitive processing with incentive mechanisms. Developed during my Master’s research, leveraging TypeScript for orchestration and Rust for network-critical and memory-sensitive components. 
- Implemented a race-based validation system that reduced average proof execution time in simulated environments. 
- Designed a reward system balancing speed and accuracy, increasing validator participation. 
- Some architectural details and datasets cannot be disclosed due to ongoing research and potential patentability.

projects.title: Build Your PC
projects.description: MegaMamute - VTEX CMS, JavaScript, jQueryLanding dynamic product configuration page that automated cart creation based on the selection of PC components, generating an increase of more than 20% in the average ticket during campaigns within severe CMS restrictions.

projects.title: Corsair
projects.description: Automation tool for Magento 1 & 2 development environments, built with PHP (Symfony/Console), ShellScript, and Docker.- Cut setup time from 3 hours to under 20 minutes, boosting productivity across teams of more than 40 developers.- Standardized processes across projects, reducing environment setup errors by 70%.

projects.title: Engine (Magento 2 Adapter)
projects.description: Module extending Magento 1 with Magento 2 features, using PHP ZendFramework.- Designed a modern dependency system, reducing incompatibility bugs by 35%.- Enabled legacy projects to benefit from modern module capabilities without full migration costs.
skills: HTML5 · Zend Framework · docker · SQL · MySQL · Magento · JavaScript · Vue.js

projects.title: MageSearch
projects.description: Bis2Bis - MySQL, Magento EAV, product discoveryFull-text search system designed for Magento's EAV model with attribute-based ranking. Improved search relevance and product discovery without requiring separate infrastructure with Solr or Elasticsearch.
skills: HTML5 · Elasticsearch · docker · MySQL · JavaScript · Vue.js

projects.title: Magento Multitenancy
projects.description: Proof-of-concept project to introduce multitenancy capabilities into Magento 1, achieved by modifying its core behavior and leveraging load balancers. The initiative enabled more than 1,000 projects to operate on a single unified codebase, moving away from a fragmented, multi-faceted system.-Consolidated infrastructure reduced overall maintenance efforts and deployment complexity across large-scale implementations.-Demonstrated scalability and efficiency gains, with measurable reductions in patching and upgrade times.-Served as a foundation for unifying diverse e-commerce operations under a centralized architecture, validating the feasibility of long-term consolidation strategies.
skills: HTML5 · docker · SQL · Scalable web apps · MySQL · JavaScript · Vue.js

projects.title: MicroClean
projects.description: IoT system developed with .NET (C#) and Arduino (C/C++) for real-time monitoring of water filtration quality.- Awarded 4th place in a national SENAI competition.- Delivered sensor accuracy above 92% in validation scenarios.- Interdisciplinary collaboration with biotechnology ensured real industrial applicability.

projects.title: Utility Bill Payment Module
projects.dates: Developed a Magento 2 payment solution (CORBAN) for settling water and electricity bills using promotional points as an internal payment method. The system was integrated with Itaú Bank and later extended to Bradesco, ensuring secure, real-time financial transactions within the e-commerce environment.-Enabled customers to convert loyalty points into direct payments for essential services, boosting engagement and platform stickiness.-Delivered seamless banking integrations, reducing transaction failures by over 30% compared to legacy processes.-Provided a scalable foundation for expanding financial services within Magento 2, strengthening its role as a multi-purpose commerce hub.
